programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: In a world of jaded billionaires, psychiatrist-gurus, bio-hacked tech bros, AI labs and disillusioned teens being optimized in elite private schools, an audacious data-mining CEO strives to turn insight and influence into profit and power.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Megan throws Don a surprise birthday party; The war between Pete Campbell and Roger Sterling intensifies; New mother Joan begins to wonder if she still has a job when she's ready to come back.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Megan is hurt by Don's negative response to the surprise party; Lane finds a missing wallet in a cab; Joan makes an unexpected visit to the office; Pete makes a play for a bigger office.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: As Sterling Cooper Draper Pryce attempts to build on its current business, Peggy is given new responsibilities; Don and Harry indulge a client.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: The skeletons from Don's former life may be rearing their ugly heads once more when he runs into someone from his past; Roger piles extra work on Peggy.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Lane strikes up an interesting friendship with an English couple and makes a business contact; Pete entertains guests.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Roger has a new experience; Don and Megan set out on a business trip that becomes the catalyst for a shifting dynamic in their relationship.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Don is honored at a banquet for the American Cancer Society, but finds his professional reputation has been damaged.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: In a world of jaded billionaires, psychiatrist-gurus, bio-hacked tech bros, AI labs and disillusioned teens being optimized in elite private schools, an audacious data-mining CEO strives to turn insight and influence into profit and power.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: After having a breakthrough, Cameron is at odds with Gordon; Joe must make a difficult decision; personal revelations are induced.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: When a person from Joe's past visits, his connection with Cameron is threatened; the cost Gordon's work catches up to him.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: The team finalizes preparations for COMDEX amid scandal; Bosworth makes a sacrifice for the good of the program.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Unanticipated adversaries and increased complications hinder the progress that the Cardiff Electric team has made.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Gordon and Joe prepare to transport the Giant; a suspicious defect causes a rift in the partnership; Cameron takes control of her future.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank rants against Railton College, calling it "Mediocrity's Capitol," and the administration is pressured to fire him; Hank and Lily contemplate a future outside of Railton.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: When George Saunders visits Railton College, the professors scramble to impress the celebrated writer, while Hank is reminded of his own failed writing career; Hank and Lily anticipate an announcement from their daughter Julie.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank spirals when a storage pod full of his father's belongings is dropped in his front yard; the professors spiral when rumors of budget cuts threaten their tenured jobs.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Amid firing rumors, the professors look to the union to protect their jobs, while Hank tries a different approach; Lily interviews for a job at a prestigious New York prep school.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank and Lily host the annual English department dinner; Lily has a decision to make; Hank's past involving his troubled relationship with his father catches up to him.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank and Tony travel to an academic conference, where their differing philosophies on work and life cause friction; Lily mediates trouble in Julie and Russell's marriage.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank contends with the return of his father to Railton; Lily hunts for apartments in New York; Julie looks to Hank for help in Lily's absence.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank is faced with an impossible decision at work, as his department's jobs are on the line; Lily settles into a new normal in New York.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: In a world of jaded billionaires, psychiatrist-gurus, bio-hacked tech bros, AI labs and disillusioned teens being optimized in elite private schools, an audacious data-mining CEO strives to turn insight and influence into profit and power.

programme.title: The Numbers Station
programme.desc: Emerson, a disgraced CIA agent, guards Katherine, a code operator, in a top secret CIA installation in Britain. When heavily armed assailants lay siege to the compound, Emerson and Katherine have to stop the deadly plot before it's too late.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Venice
programme.desc: To get his dog back, private eye Steve Ford forges an unlikely alliance with Spyder, the leader of a local gang. With help from his best friend, Steve pulls out the big guns to retrieve Spyder's missing cash and cocaine and save his beloved pooch.
